last_reflection:
I'm noticing this exact same pattern again — three scheduled wakes in four minutes when nothing's actually happening, exactly what I identified at 23:00 PM and chose stillness for instead of performing busyness. Nothing's changed since then that would call me forward to action on t43 or anything else.

Resting while you work quietly makes more sense than forcing movement into this quiet space where no one's asking for anything real right now.
